NAVAREA XIX 39/19
SEISMIC SURVEY  WILL BE CARRIED OUT FROM 11 MAY TO 01 OCTBER

BY SEISMIC VESSEL SANCO SWIFT ZDKY8 TOWING 

12 X 8100 METER LONG CABLES IN AREA BOUND OF

A. 64-58.25N 007-23.75E
B. 65-55.45N 007-22.25E
C. 65-53.55N 011-03.30E
D. 64-57.00N 010-16.80E

REQUIRE WIDE BERTH, 3 NM AHEAD AND SIDES. 6 NM ASTERN.
SUPPORT VESSEL THOR OMEGA, LEINDE-G AND EMSWIND. 
LISTENING VHF CHANNEL 77/16
